en: Backend and Cloud developer with experience designing distributed systems, APIs, automation workflows, IoT telemetry, and cloud-native infrastructure. Strong background with AWS Lambda, AppSync, DynamoDB, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, MongoDB, Docker, and infrastructure as code, with focus on scalability, cost awareness, observability, and maintainability in production systems.

Experienced in high-volume data environments, including pipelines for reading, validating, transforming, and delivering field equipment measurements, as well as event-driven and serverless processing architectures. Also works with applied AI in engineering workflows and products, including RAG, MCP, LLM automation, and agents for productivity, data analysis, and new feature development.

Technical generalist with a solid foundation in backend, databases, and cloud, able to understand legacy systems, refactor complex flows, reduce bottlenecks, and turn business problems into practical solutions. Collaborative profile with experience supporting architectural decisions and technical mentoring.
pt: Desenvolvedor Backend e Cloud com experiencia em arquitetura de sistemas distribuidos, APIs, automacoes, telemetria IoT e infraestrutura em nuvem. Atuacao forte com AWS Lambda, AppSync, DynamoDB, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, MongoDB, Docker e infraestrutura como codigo, com foco em escalabilidade, custo, observabilidade e manutencao de sistemas em producao.

Experiencia em ambientes com alto volume de dados, incluindo pipelines de leitura, validacao, transformacao e envio de medicoes de equipamentos de campo, alem de arquiteturas orientadas a eventos e processamento serverless. Tambem atua com IA aplicada a engenharia e produtos, incluindo RAG, MCP, automacoes com LLMs e agentes para produtividade, analise de dados e novas funcionalidades.

Perfil tecnico generalista com base solida em backend, bancos de dados e cloud, com facilidade para entender sistemas legados, refatorar fluxos complexos, reduzir gargalos e transformar problemas de negocio em solucoes praticas. Experiencia colaborando com times, apoiando decisoes arquiteturais e mentoria tecnica.
